The '''''Captain's Pride''''' was an [[Ugor/Legends|Ugor]] [[Black Hole-class Salvage Dreadnought|''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought]].

==History==
It gathered debris in the wake of the [[Imperial Armored Transport]] [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']], near the devastated planet [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]]. There, the ''Captain's Pride'' competed aggressively with a rival scavenger vessel, the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Momship]] ''[[Thrifty]]'' (which had arrived first) and with ''Elusive''{{'s}} [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] pursuers aboard the shuttle ''[[Bonderium]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
